allow: Bash(npx shadcn@latest add button input label card separator --overwrite)

Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const data = JSON.parse\(chunks.join\(''\)\); const paths = data.paths || {}; Object.keys\(paths\).sort\(\).forEach\(path => { const methods = paths[path]; Object.keys\(methods\).forEach\(method => { const info = methods[method]; const params = \(info.parameters || []\).map\(p => p.name\); console.log\(method.toUpperCase\(\) + ' ' + path + ' | ' + \(info.summary||''\) + ' | params:' + params.join\(','\)\); }\); }\); console.log\('---DEFINITIONS---'\); const defs = data.definitions || {}; Object.keys\(defs\).sort\(\).forEach\(name => { if \(name.includes\('Request'\) || name.includes\('request'\)\) { const props = Object.keys\(defs[name].properties || {}\); console.log\(name + ': ' + props.join\(', '\)\); } }\); }\); ")

Bash(node -e " const chunks = []; process.stdin.on\('data', c => chunks.push\(c\)\); process.stdin.on\('end', \(\) => { const data = JSON.parse\(chunks.join\(''\)\); const defs = data.definitions || {}; // Print translation group and comic response definitions ['translation-group', 'comic', 'chapter', 'member', 'user'].forEach\(keyword => { Object.keys\(defs\).forEach\(name => { if \(name.toLowerCase\(\).includes\(keyword\) && !name.includes\('Request'\)\) { const props = Object.keys\(defs[name].properties || {}\); if \(props.length > 0\) console.log\(name + ': ' + props.join\(', '\)\); } }\); }\); }\); ")
